### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1

Authorization: Bearer REDACTED

Connection: close

Content-Type: application/proto

X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED

X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/analyze.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 6
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:17:55 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

```
{}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/analyze.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"netprof analyze subcommand.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.config import load_config\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.pcap_reader import read_pcap, discover_capture_files\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.flow_tracker import FlowTracker\r\nfrom netprof.parsers.tcp_reassembly import TCPReassembler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http1 import HTTP1Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import HTTP2Handler\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.grpc import GrpcHandler\r\nfrom netprof.report.summary_builder import build_summary\r\nfrom netprof.report.profile_md import build_profile_md\r\nfrom netprof.report.errors import ErrorLogger\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _capture_file_id(path: Path, index: int) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Stable id for correlation (basename or index).\"\"\"\r\n    return path.name or str(index)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _run_protocols(\r\n    c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n    s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n    flow_id: str,\r\n    c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    errors: ErrorLogger,\r\n) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n    \"\"\"Run protocol handlers in order: HTTP/2 (+ gRPC) or HTTP/1.1. Return merged transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    http2_handler = HTTP2Handler()\r\n    grpc_handler = GrpcHandler()\r\n    http1_handler = HTTP1Handler()\r\n    if http2_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        http2_txns = http2_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_txns = grpc_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n        grpc_streams = {(t.flow_id, t.stream_id) for t in grpc_txns if t.stream_id is not None}\r\n        out = []\r\n        for t in http2_txns:\r\n            if (t.flow_id, t.stream_id) in grpc_streams:\r\n                continue\r\n            out.append(t)\r\n        out.extend(grpc_txns)\r\n        return out\r\n    if http1_handler.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n        return http1_handler.parse(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map)\r\n    return []\r\n\r\n\r\ndef analyze_cmd(\r\n    pcap_path: Path = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Path to PCAP/PCAPNG file or directory\"),\r\n    out: Path = typer.Option(..., \"--out\", help=\"Output directory\"),\r\n    config: Path | None = typer.Option(None, \"--config\", help=\"Optional YAML config path\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Analyze PCAP/PCAPNG and write summary, flows, transactions, profile.md, errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n    settings = load_config(config)\r\n    out_path = Path(out)\r\n    out_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\r\n    errors = ErrorLogger(out_path)\r\n    try:\r\n        files = discover_capture_files(Path(pcap_path))\r\n        if not files:\r\n            typer.echo(f\"No capture files found at {pcap_path}\", err=True)\r\n            raise typer.Exit(1)\r\n        reassembler = TCPReassembler(max_bytes_per_direction=settings.reassembly_buffer_per_flow_bytes)\r\n        all_flows: list[Flow] = []\r\n        all_transactions: list[Transaction] = []\r\n        for file_index, path in enumerate(files):\r\n            capture_file_id = _capture_file_id(path, file_index)\r\n            tracker = FlowTracker(\r\n                capture_file_id=capture_file_id,\r\n                flow_idle_timeout_sec=settings.flow_idle_timeout_sec,\r\n                concurrency_bucket_seconds=settings.concurrency_bucket_seconds,\r\n            )\r\n            try:\r\n                for ts, src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags in read_pcap(\r\n                    path\r\n                ):\r\n                    for flow, segments in tracker.ingest(\r\n                        ts, src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port, protocol, payload, tcp_seq, tcp_flags\r\n                    ):\r\n                        c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                        if truncated:\r\n                            errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                        all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                        txns = _run_protocols(\r\n                            c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors\r\n                        )\r\n                        all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n            except Exception as e:\r\n                errors.log(f\"Error processing {path}: {e}\")\r\n            for flow, segments in tracker.flush_idle():\r\n                c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, truncated = reassembler.reassemble(segments)\r\n                if truncated:\r\n                    errors.log(\"Reassembly truncated\", flow_id=flow.flow_id, detail=\"buffer limit\")\r\n                all_flows.append(flow)\r\n                txns = _run_protocols(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes, flow.flow_id, c2s_ts_map, s2c_ts_map, errors)\r\n                all_transactions.extend(txns)\r\n        # Write flows.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"flows.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for flow in all_flows:\r\n                f.write(flow.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Write transactions.jsonl\r\n        with open(out_path / \"transactions.jsonl\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            for t in all_transactions:\r\n                f.write(t.to_jsonl_line() + \"\\n\")\r\n        # Summary and profile\r\n        summary = build_summary(\r\n            all_flows,\r\n            all_transactions,\r\n            top_talkers_n=settings.top_talkers_n,\r\n            top_destinations_n=settings.top_destinations_n,\r\n            top_ports_n=settings.top_ports_n,\r\n        )\r\n        with open(out_path / \"summary.json\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(json.dumps(summary.model_dump(), indent=2))\r\n        profile_md = build_profile_md(summary, all_transactions)\r\n        with open(out_path / \"profile.md\", \"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as f:\r\n            f.write(profile_md)\r\n        typer.echo(f\"Wrote {out_path}: {len(all_flows)} flows, {len(all_transactions)} transactions.\")\r\n    finally:\r\n        errors.close()\r\n", "4:VARINT": 6}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```
